name: Social Media (default)
description: Public-opinion simulation on social platforms. Reproduces the engine's original behaviour: a China-timezone activity rhythm with a peak evening window, running on parallel Twitter- and Reddit-style feeds.
prompt_framing: This is a public-opinion simulation on social media. Agents are ordinary users, influencers, media accounts and stakeholders reacting to a trending event. Model realistic posting, liking, reposting and commenting behaviour, echo chambers, and how sentiment shifts over time.
